_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.

_contextSnippet: Similarly, knockdown of an EMT/stemness regulator ALDH1A1 also blocked MPNST tumor cell proliferation
details: Knockdown of ALDH1A1 blocked MPNST tumor cell proliferation
